title: asplenium balansae
intro: Asplenium balansae, also known as Balansa's spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Asplenium balansae include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or made into a decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
